sentences.english: I went shopping for new clothes yesterday.
I needed a new jacket for winter.
I tried on three different jackets.
The blue one was too big and the black one was too expensive.
sentences.korean: 파란 건 너무 크고 검은 건 너무 비쌌어요.

sentences.english: I bought the gray one because it fit perfectly and was on sale.
sentences.korean: 회색 것을 샀어요. 딱 맞고 세일 중이었거든요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
